content.text: {"selected_item_id": "a1b2c3d4-0001-0000-0000-000000000001", "selected_item_name": "Habanero Shrimp Tacos", "pitch": "Since you love spicy and crunchy, our Habanero Shrimp Tacos are made for you — crispy shrimp in a fiery habanero glaze that'll light up your evening.", "upsell_triggered": true, "upsell_item_id": "a1b2c3d4-0010-0000-0000-000000000010", "upsell_item_name": "Fresh Guacamole & Chips", "upsell_pitch": "Add our table-side guac — it's the perfect cooling counterpoint to all that heat.", "reasoning": "Best semantic match for spicy/crunchy request with high margin score."}
